description_long: This object is a compact solar energy infrastructure unit featuring a flat, rectangular array of solar panels mounted on a low-profile base. The panels are dark, likely monocrystalline or polycrystalline silicon, and are bordered by a metallic frame, possibly aluminum. The base structure appears to house electrical components, with some raised enclosures and vent-like features suggesting inverter or control unit placement. Red and gray accents on the base may indicate safety markings or access panels. The overall design is streamlined for ground installation, with the panels slightly elevated above the base. The unit is suitable for urban environments such as rooftops, parking lots, or small utility installations.
description: A compact, flat solar panel array on a low-profile base with metallic framing and red safety accents, designed for ground or rooftop installation. The structure includes raised enclosures likely for electrical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat solar panel array and the raised enclosures on the base, with visible red and gray accents.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the width of the panel array and the arrangement of the raised enclosures, with red safety markings more prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the solar panel array and the base structure, with vent-like features visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the base, showing the alignment of the panels and the distribution of red and gray accents.
attribute_panel_orientation: flat, parallel to the base, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with a low-profile metallic (likely aluminum) frame
attribute_array_configuration: single row of 3-4 rectangular panels arranged side by side
